mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS RNUM, T1.* FROM ( SELECT O.ORDER_TOTAL_PRICE, O.ORDER_DATE, ( SELECT MIN(C.COMPANY_NAME) FROM ORDER_DETAIL OD JOIN PRODUCT P ON OD.PRODUCT_ID = P.PRODUCT_ID JOIN COMPANY C ON P.COMPANY_CODE = C.COMPANY_CODE WHERE OD.ORDER_ID = O.ORDER_ID ) AS COMPANY_NAME FROM ORDERS O WHERE O.ORDER_DATE >= #{startDate} AND O.ORDER_DATE < #{nextMonthStartDate} AND O.ORDER_CANCEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY O.ORDER_DATE DESC ) T1 ) WHERE RNUM BETWEEN #{offset} AND #{limit}
